title: KillFX
description: this project adds 3d Kill Effects to minecraft
body:
# KillFx
**killFX** is a mod that adds customizable 3d Kill Effects to the game. 

## Features
**Supports .bbmodel**
**Easy to understand config**
**Easy to add Effects**

**Want to share your work go ahead on our discord server**
[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/5ynuhvDPXz)


also for forge i suggest you use [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)
since it is compatible with the latest forgified fabric api
